creator: dougs@dawnsign.com
text:
Saw that 4.6.15 was released today and ran portmaster -awd to update. At end of update received an error message as follows:

/usr/local/lib/samba4/private/libsamba-debug-samba4.so: version SAMBA_4.6.14 required by /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libndr.so.0 not found

It appears that files in /usr/local/lib/samba4/private/ has been updated to 4.6.15 but files in /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/ are still at 4.6.14 judging by their datestamps.

root@dorado:/usr/ports/net/samba46# ll /usr/local/lib/samba4/private/
total 16096
